name: CascadeSelect
description: CascadeSelect is a form component to select a value from a nested structure of options.

props.name: modelValue
props.description: Value of the component.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: The default value for the input when not controlled by `modelValue`.

props.name: name
props.description: The name attribute for the element, typically used in form submissions.

props.name: options
props.description: An array of selectitems to display as the available options.

props.name: optionLabel
props.description: Property name or getter function to use as the label of an option.

props.name: optionValue
props.description: Property name or getter function to use as the value of an option, defaults to the option itself when not defined.

props.name: optionDisabled
props.description: Property name or getter function to use as the disabled flag of an option, defaults to false when not defined.

props.name: optionGroupLabel
props.description: Property name or getter function to use as the label of an option group.

props.name: optionGroupChildren
props.description: Property name or getter function to retrieve the items of a group.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Default text to display when no option is selected.

props.name: breakpoint
props.description: The breakpoint to define the maximum width boundary.

props.name: size
props.description: Defines the size of the component.

props.name: invalid
props.description: When present, it specifies that the component should have invalid state style.

props.name: disabled
props.description: When present, it specifies that the component should be disabled.

props.name: variant
props.description: Specifies the input variant of the component.

props.name: dataKey
props.description: A property to uniquely identify an option.

props.name: showClear
props.description: When enabled, a clear icon is displayed to clear the value.

props.name: clearIcon
props.description: Icon to display in clear button.

props.name: inputId
props.description: Identifier of the underlying input element.

props.name: inputStyle
props.description: Inline style of the input field.

props.name: inputClass
props.description: Style class of the input field.

props.name: inputProps
props.description: Used to pass all properties of the HTMLInputElement to the focusable input element inside the component.

props.name: panelStyle
props.description: Inline style of the overlay overlay.

props.name: panelClass
props.description: Style class of the overlay overlay.

props.name: panelProps
props.description: Used to pass all properties of the HTMLDivElement to the overlay overlay inside the component.

props.name: overlayStyle
props.description: Inline style of the overlay overlay.

props.name: overlayClass
props.description: Style class of the overlay overlay.

props.name: overlayProps
props.description: Used to pass all properties of the HTMLDivElement to the overlay overlay inside the component.

props.name: appendTo
props.description: A valid query selector or an HTMLElement to specify where the overlay gets attached. Special keywords are 'body' for document body and 'self' for the element itself.

props.name: loading
props.description: Whether the dropdown is in loading state.

props.name: dropdownIcon
props.description: Icon to display in the dropdown.

props.name: loadingIcon
props.description: Icon to display in loading state.

props.name: optionGroupIcon
props.description: Icon to display in the option group.

props.name: autoOptionFocus
props.description: Whether to focus on the first visible or selected element when the overlay panel is shown.

props.name: selectOnFocus
props.description: When enabled, the focused option is selected/opened.

props.name: focusOnHover
props.description: When enabled, the focus is placed on the hovered option.

props.name: searchLocale
props.description: Locale to use in searching. The default locale is the host environment's current locale.

props.name: searchMessage
props.description: Text to be displayed in hidden accessible field when filtering returns any results. Defaults to value from PrimeVue locale configuration.

props.name: selectionMessage
props.description: Text to be displayed in hidden accessible field when options are selected. Defaults to value from PrimeVue locale configuration.

props.name: emptySelectionMessage
props.description: Text to be displayed in hidden accessible field when any option is not selected. Defaults to value from PrimeVue locale configuration.

props.name: emptySearchMessage
props.description: Text to display when filtering does not return any results. Defaults to value from PrimeVue locale configuration.

props.name: emptyMessage
props.description: Text to be displayed when there are no options available. Defaults to value from PrimeVue locale configuration.

props.name: tabindex
props.description: Index of the element in tabbing order.

props.name: fluid
props.description: Spans 100% width of the container when enabled.

props.name: ariaLabelledby
props.description: Establishes relationships between the component and label(s) where its value should be one or more element IDs.

props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Establishes a string value that labels the component.

props.name: formControl
props.description: Form control object, typically used for handling validation and form state.

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When enabled, it removes component related styles in the core.

events.name: value-change
events.description: Emitted when the value changes in uncontrolled mode.

events.name: change
events.description: Callback to invoke on value change.

events.name: focus
events.description: Callback to invoke when the component receives focus.

events.name: blur
events.description: Callback to invoke when the component loses focus.

events.name: group-change
events.description: Callback to invoke when a group changes.

events.name: before-show
events.description: Callback to invoke before the overlay is shown.

events.name: before-hide
events.description: Callback to invoke before the overlay is hidden.

events.name: show
events.description: Callback to invoke when the overlay is shown.

events.name: hide
events.description: Callback to invoke when the overlay is hidden.

slots.name: option
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Option instance */ option: any; /** * Selection state */ selected: boolean; }): VNode[]

slots.name: value
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Value of the component */ value: any; /** * Placeholder text to show */ placeholder: string; }): VNode[]

slots.name: optiongroupicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the icon. */ class: string; }): VNode[]

slots.name: header
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Current value */ value: any; /** * Options of the component */ options: any[]; }): VNode[]

slots.name: footer
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Current value */ value: any; /** * Options of the component */ options: any[]; }): VNode[]

slots.name: clearicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Clear icon click function. * @param {Event} event - Browser event */ clearCallback: (event: Event) => void; }): VNode[]
